name: Applesauce Breakfast Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups AM Griddle Lite Pancake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the molasses, honey, vanilla, and almond extract in a bowl.
2. Add the pancake mix to the wet ingredients and stir gently until just combined.
3. Pour the batter into a well-oiled square cake pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Serve warm with butter and syrup, or with a dollop of flavored yogurt.
